articles.title: Terra Classic Price Prediction - Why Is LUNC Pumping FOMC Week
articles.description: The LUNC price is pumping again, up 15% this week and back in the five top crypto gainers today on Binance, just behind ApeCoin. This latest LUNC pump is a considerable show of strength by the bulls - with the Bitcoin price still trading under $20,000 and Ethereum under $1,400 as market sentiment moves 'risk off' heading into the FOMC meeting Wednesday.... articles.title: Crypto trader exploits GMX, manipulates AVAX price to remove $565K
articles.description: A crypto trader on GMX exchange leveraged the zero slippage feature to extract over $565,000 in profit by manipulating the price of the AVAX token.

articles.title: Cosmos (ATOM) Price Looks Ready to Break out, With Next Resistance at $22
articles.description: Cosmos (ATOM) has broken out from a long-term resistance but has created a short-term bearish pattern which could lead to a slight retracement.

articles.title: U.K. Financial Regulator FCA Warns Against Using FTX
articles.description: The FCA has previously warned U.K. consumers against FTX rival Binance. articles.title: Do Kwon’s Prosecutors Seeking Interpol Red Notice as Chase Continues
articles.description: Prosecutors said that Kwon was obviously on the run after he denied that he was hiding from authorities.
